title: selinum conioides
intro: Selinum conioides, also known as Kingdaise or Kingdaize, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selinum conioides include alleviating symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Selinum conioides can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, to make use of its medicinal properties.
